examples.en: We strolled along the beach at sunset.
examples.zh: 我們在日落時沿著海灘散步。

examples.en: She likes to stroll through the park after dinner.
examples.zh: 她喜歡晚餐後在公園裡散步。

examples.en: He rushed to catch the last train.
examples.zh: 他匆忙趕搭最後一班火車。

examples.en: Don't rush; we still have plenty of time.
examples.zh: 別急,我們還有很多時間。

examples.en: The baby crawled across the living room floor.
examples.zh: 寶寶在客廳地板上爬來爬去。

examples.en: We had to crawl through the narrow tunnel.
examples.zh: 我們必須爬過狹窄的隧道。

examples.en: They wandered around the old town all afternoon.
examples.zh: 他們整個下午在舊城區閒逛。

examples.en: The child wandered off and got lost.
examples.zh: 那孩子走散了,迷了路。

examples.en: He sprinted to the finish line.
examples.zh: 他衝刺到終點線。

examples.en: She sprinted across the road to catch the bus.
examples.zh: 她衝過馬路去趕公車。

examples.en: I jog around the lake every morning.
examples.zh: 我每天早上繞著湖慢跑。

examples.en: They jogged slowly to warm up.
examples.zh: 他們慢跑暖身。

examples.en: The cat leaped onto the table.
examples.zh: 貓跳上了桌子。

examples.en: He leaped over the puddle.
examples.zh: 他跳過了水坑。

examples.en: The rabbit hopped across the garden.
examples.zh: 兔子蹦跳著穿過花園。

examples.en: She hopped on one foot to keep her balance.
examples.zh: 她單腳跳著保持平衡。

examples.en: They climbed the mountain before dawn.
examples.zh: 他們在黎明前登上了山。

examples.en: The boy climbed up the tree.
examples.zh: 男孩爬上了樹。

examples.en: The soldiers marched down the street.
examples.zh: 士兵們沿街行進。

examples.en: The band marched onto the field.
examples.zh: 樂隊行進進入場地。

examples.en: We waded across the shallow stream.
examples.zh: 我們涉水過了淺溪。

examples.en: The children waded into the water.
examples.zh: 孩子們涉水走進水裡。

examples.en: She tiptoed past the sleeping baby.
examples.zh: 她踮著腳走過熟睡的寶寶。

examples.en: He tiptoed into the dark room.
examples.zh: 他踮腳走進漆黑的房間。

examples.en: He stumbled over a rock in the dark.
examples.zh: 他在黑暗中被石頭絆倒。

examples.en: She stumbled but did not fall.
examples.zh: 她踉蹌了一下但沒摔倒。

examples.en: She dashed out of the house in a hurry.
examples.zh: 她匆忙衝出屋子。

examples.en: He dashed across the street when it started to rain.
examples.zh: 開始下雨時他衝過了馬路。

examples.en: The cat crept toward the bird.
examples.zh: 貓悄悄地朝小鳥靠近。

examples.en: He crept downstairs so no one would hear him.
examples.zh: 他躡手躡腳下樓,以免被人聽見。

examples.en: The kids slid down the snowy hill.
examples.zh: 孩子們從雪坡上滑下來。

examples.en: She slid across the icy floor.
examples.zh: 她從結冰的地板上滑過去。

examples.en: The skater glided smoothly across the ice.
examples.zh: 溜冰者平穩地滑過冰面。

examples.en: The bird glided over the lake.
examples.zh: 鳥兒滑翔過湖面。

examples.en: He limped off the field after the injury.
examples.zh: 受傷後他一跛一跛地離開球場。

examples.en: The dog limped home on three legs.
examples.zh: 那隻狗用三條腿一跛一跛地回家。

examples.en: The monkey swung from branch to branch.
examples.zh: 猴子在樹枝間擺盪。

examples.en: She swung her arms as she walked.
examples.zh: 她走路時擺動雙臂。

examples.en: The dancer spun gracefully on stage.
examples.zh: 舞者在舞台上優雅地旋轉。

examples.en: The kids spun around until they got dizzy.
examples.zh: 孩子們轉圈圈轉到頭暈。

examples.en: He crouched behind the wall to hide.
examples.zh: 他蹲在牆後躲藏。

examples.en: The runner crouched at the starting line.
examples.zh: 跑者在起跑線上蹲伏。

examples.en: She knelt down to tie her shoe.
examples.zh: 她跪下來綁鞋帶。

examples.en: He knelt beside the injured man.
examples.zh: 他跪在受傷的男子旁邊。

examples.en: Bend your knees when you lift the box.
examples.zh: 搬箱子時要彎膝蓋。

examples.en: She bent down to pick up the coin.
examples.zh: 她彎腰撿起硬幣。

examples.en: She stretched her arms after waking up.
examples.zh: 她起床後伸展雙臂。

examples.en: Remember to stretch before you run.
examples.zh: 跑步前記得伸展。

examples.en: He slipped on the wet floor.
examples.zh: 他在濕滑的地板上滑倒了。

examples.en: She slipped out of the room quietly.
examples.zh: 她悄悄溜出了房間。

examples.en: The ball rolled down the hill.
examples.zh: 球滾下了山坡。

examples.en: The dog rolled over on the grass.
examples.zh: 狗在草地上打滾。

examples.en: The dog chased the cat around the yard.
examples.zh: 狗在院子裡追著貓跑。

examples.en: Police chased the thief down the alley.
examples.zh: 警察沿著巷子追捕小偷。

examples.en: The villagers fled from the flood.
examples.zh: 村民們逃離洪水。

examples.en: The birds fled at the sound of the gun.
examples.zh: 槍聲一響,鳥群便飛逃了。

examples.en: The boat drifted slowly down the river.
examples.zh: 小船順著河緩緩漂流。

examples.en: Leaves drifted across the yard in the wind.
examples.zh: 落葉在風中飄過院子。

examples.en: The driver swerved to avoid the dog.
examples.zh: 駕駛急轉彎以避開那隻狗。

examples.en: The cyclist swerved around the pothole.
examples.zh: 騎士繞開了坑洞。

examples.en: The worm wriggled through the soil.
examples.zh: 蟲子在土裡蠕動。

examples.en: The child wriggled free from his coat.
examples.zh: 孩子扭動身子從外套裡掙脫。

examples.en: He staggered home after the long hike.
examples.zh: 長途健行後他蹣跚地走回家。

examples.en: She staggered under the heavy load.
examples.zh: 她在沉重的負荷下搖搖晃晃。

examples.en: She tripped over the loose wire.
examples.zh: 她被鬆脫的電線絆倒。

examples.en: Be careful not to trip on the step.
examples.zh: 小心別在台階上絆倒。

examples.en: They scrambled up the steep rocks.
examples.zh: 他們手腳並用爬上陡峭的岩石。

examples.en: The kids scrambled for the candy.
examples.zh: 孩子們爭搶著糖果。

examples.en: The horse trotted around the field.
examples.zh: 馬在場地裡小跑。

examples.en: The dog trotted happily beside its owner.
examples.zh: 狗開心地在主人身旁小跑。

examples.en: He paced the room while waiting for the news.
examples.zh: 他在房裡來回踱步等消息。

examples.en: She paced nervously before the interview.
examples.zh: 面試前她緊張地踱來踱去。

examples.en: She leaned against the wall to rest.
examples.zh: 她靠著牆休息。

examples.en: He leaned forward to hear better.
examples.zh: 他身子前傾好聽得更清楚。

examples.en: He ducked to avoid the low branch.
examples.zh: 他低頭閃過低垂的樹枝。

examples.en: She ducked behind the car for cover.
examples.zh: 她躲到車子後面掩護。

examples.en: He dodged the ball just in time.
examples.zh: 他及時閃開了球。

examples.en: She dodged through the busy crowd.
examples.zh: 她在擁擠的人群中穿梭閃躲。

examples.en: He sneaked out of the house at night.
examples.zh: 他夜裡偷偷溜出屋子。

examples.en: She sneaked into the kitchen for a snack.
examples.zh: 她偷偷溜進廚房找點心。

examples.en: He plunged into the cold lake.
examples.zh: 他縱身跳進冰冷的湖裡。

examples.en: The diver plunged from the high cliff.
examples.zh: 跳水者從高崖上一躍而下。

examples.en: Hurry, or we'll miss the movie.
examples.zh: 快點,不然我們會錯過電影。

examples.en: She hurried to finish her homework.
examples.zh: 她趕著寫完功課。

examples.en: The gymnast flipped over the bar.
examples.zh: 體操選手翻越過單槓。

examples.en: He flipped the pancake in the pan.
examples.zh: 他把鍋裡的鬆餅翻了個面。

examples.en: The ball bounced off the wall.
examples.zh: 球從牆上彈開。

examples.en: The kids bounced on the trampoline.
examples.zh: 孩子們在彈跳床上蹦跳。

examples.en: The old man shuffled down the hallway.
examples.zh: 老人拖著腳步走過走廊。

examples.en: She shuffled slowly toward the door.
examples.zh: 她慢慢拖著腳走向門口。

examples.en: The horse galloped across the open field.
examples.zh: 馬在空曠的原野上疾馳。

examples.en: The children galloped around like horses.
examples.zh: 孩子們像馬一樣飛奔嬉戲。

examples.en: We hiked up the trail to the waterfall.
examples.zh: 我們沿步道健行到瀑布。

examples.en: They hiked for hours through the forest.
examples.zh: 他們在森林裡健行了好幾個小時。

examples.en: She twisted her body to look behind.
examples.zh: 她扭轉身體往後看。

examples.en: He twisted around to see who was calling.
examples.zh: 他轉過身看是誰在叫他。

examples.en: The eagle soared high above the mountains.
examples.zh: 老鷹在群山上空高高翱翔。

examples.en: The kite soared into the clear sky.
examples.zh: 風箏飛向晴朗的天空。

examples.en: He tumbled down the grassy slope.
examples.zh: 他從草坡上翻滾而下。

examples.en: The books tumbled off the shelf.
examples.zh: 書從架子上掉了下來。
